_description: Vibe AI generation rules for @xpell/core runtime behavior: XpellEngine, XModule, XObject, XData, XDataModule, XEM, commands, nano-commands, runtime accessor injection, and platform-neutral execution.
_core_rules: Apply xpell-contract first.
@xpell/core is platform-neutral runtime foundation.
@xpell/core is not a UI renderer, DOM layer, Node/server layer, persistence layer, or business framework.
Do not add UI, DOM, CSS, show/hide, layout, browser API, server API, or filesystem behavior to XObject or core.
Core primitives such as XObject must not import _x or Xpell directly.
Use setXRuntime(runtime) and getXRuntime() for runtime accessor injection.
XObject may call getXRuntime() only for _module command routing.
Do not use dynamic import('./Xpell') inside XObject.
Module commands require explicit _module and _op.
Local nano commands require _op and omit _module.
XModule command my-op maps to method _my_op.
Object-targeted commands require explicit _object.
XObject.execute priority is: _module routing first, then local nano command, then error.
Commands with _module always route through getXRuntime().execute(...).
Local nano commands are used only when _module is omitted.
XData/_xd is shared runtime memory only.
XData is not persistence.
XData is not an event bus.
Use canonical XData APIs: get, set, patch, touch, has, delete, pick, on, off, onAny, clean.
Every XData mutation must include stable source metadata.
XData keys must be explicit, stable, and namespaced.
New code must not write through _xd._o[...]
_o may exist only for legacy compatibility and migration.
XDataModule is a thin command bridge over XData and owns no independent state.
Canonical XData command bridge module name is xd.
xd mutating ops must include stable source.
xd commands must use explicit keys and must not infer missing state.
_xem is a lightweight event bus for coordination only.
Events are not state and not persistence.
Listener order must not be assumed.
Event payloads must be explicit.
Use XData for state and _xem for signals.
Persisted or agent-generated handlers must be data-only.
Allowed handler forms are string nano-command, JSON local command, JSON module command, or array sequence.
No JS functions in persisted or agent-editable payloads.
No eval.
No function strings.
Unknown ops must be rejected at validation boundaries.
_data_source binding uses _xd.on(...).
_data_source binding calls XObject.onData(...), which may execute _on_data, _on.data, or _once.data handlers.
Data delivery is subscription-based, not frame polling.
dispose() must unbind data listeners and event listeners.
Use XError and XResponse* for protocol-facing failures.
Never log secrets, tokens, credentials, auth headers, or private keys.
_priority_rules: When generating a module command, always use explicit _module, _op, and _params.
When generating a local nano command, use _op and _params without _module.
For XData state mutation from generated handlers, prefer the xd command bridge instead of direct _xd access.
For state use xd/XData; for signals use xem/_xem.
For local object behavior, use nano-command JSON without _module.
For cross-module behavior, use JSON command with _module.
Do not generate function handlers for views, flows, entities, or agent-editable payloads.
Do not introduce timers, polling loops, or hidden background schedulers in core.
If docs and source disagree, follow source/API map and record the mismatch.

_modules._description: Event coordination command bridge/module when available.

_patterns._description: Set shared runtime state through the xd command bridge.
Use local object-scoped nano command when no module routing is required.
Use an array sequence for multiple data-only handler steps.

_anti_patterns: Adding DOM, CSS, show/hide, layout, browser APIs, server APIs, or filesystem APIs to XObject/core.
Importing _x or Xpell directly inside XObject.
Using XData as an event bus.
Using eval or executable strings in persisted payloads.
Adding hidden timers, polling loops, or background schedulers in core.

_anti_patterns._reason: Persisted or agent-generated handlers must be data-only.
Mutating XData commands must include stable source.
Local nano commands should omit _module. Commands with _module are routed through getXRuntime().execute(...).

_notes: This is the Vibe-generation version of the @xpell/core contract.
XObject.execute currently routes _module commands before local nano commands.
Commands with _module always route through getXRuntime().execute(...); local nano commands are used when _module is omitted.
DOM/browser event adaptation belongs in @xpell/ui, Node/transport/filesystem behavior belongs in @xpell/node, and 3D/spatial behavior belongs in @xpell/3d.
